Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows evidence of significant renal dysfunction (elevated creatinine, marked proteinuria, high urine microalbumin/creatinine ratio), with low blood glucose and HbA1c, suggesting possible hypoglycemia. Urine findings (cloudy, brown, low specific gravity, protein, glucose, ketones, bilirubin) further support renal impairment and possible tubular dysfunction. LDL cholesterol is mildly elevated. Recommend urgent nephrology evaluation and assessment for underlying causes of renal failure and hypoglycemia.
